task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Task [E] Media path Verification [Tasks]

section.title: Function
section.p: Optional: Load the media for calibration on roll position 2 (if available via license) via the operator panel.
Set the winding mode is set to 'ON' via the Operator Panel.
The test will step 5 meter media using 1 pass print without printing.
The printhead carriage and curing carriage move like a normal print.
During printing, all media path encoders are monitored and verified on their working ranges.
If the test returns "PASS" on all specific aspects the media path is verified and ok.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Execute the steps as indicated on the operator panel.
For some steps switch to Service user mode and operate the winder, switch back and press continue.
